headline: Asus’ top-end 4K QD-OLED gaming monitor is $400 off
summary: Asus ROG Swift 32-inch 4K QD-OLED monitor is on sale. Get $400 off, now $899.99 (was $1,299.99). Features a QD-OLED panel for superior visuals and deep blacks.

headline: Samsung's redesigned Z Fold 8 with a wide display just leaked
summary: Images of Samsung's Galaxy Z Fold 8 leaked by Evan Blass. The new design shows a shorter, wider foldable phone. Leak reveals some specs ahead of the July 22nd launch.

headline: Is America ready for this quirky Jeep-looking EV that can park itself?
summary: A new Jeep-inspired EV from Chip Motors features remote parking. It's part of a potential 'small car renaissance' in the US. Microcar sales are currently low but gaining interest.

headline: Florida man arrested for allegedly stealing over $200,000 in crypto using Steam game malware
summary: A Florida man was arrested for stealing $220,000 in crypto. He allegedly used malware embedded in Steam games. About 8,000 users were infected by the malicious games.

headline: Asus ROG Flow Z13 Ultra-Portable Gaming Laptop Sees Major Price Drop
summary: The Asus ROG Flow Z13 gaming laptop is now $1,000 off. This convertible boasts 64GB of RAM and a powerful iGPU. It's an ultra-portable 2.65lb device for gamers on the go.

headline: 8BitDo Ultimate 2C: Top PC Gaming Controller Under $50, Now Even Cheaper
summary: The 8BitDo Ultimate 2C controller is a top choice for PC gamers. It's priced under $50, currently available for less than half. Compatible with Windows PC, Android, and Steam Deck.

headline: Marathon Game Director Joseph Ziegler Is Leaving Bungie
summary: Joseph Ziegler, director of the game Marathon, is departing Bungie. This marks a significant change for the anticipated title. The reason for his departure was not specified.

headline: Today's Best Deals: Razer Huntsman Keyboard, Pokémon Collection, & More
summary: Discover top tech and gaming deals for today. Save on the Razer Huntsman Keyboard and Pokémon collectibles. Find discounts on MTG x Marvel Super Heroes items.

headline: Burnham finalising cabinet ahead of becoming PM on Monday
summary: New Labour leader Burnham prepares to become Prime Minister on Monday. He is currently finalizing his cabinet appointments. Burnham promises the biggest change in British politics for 40 years.

headline: Zeffman: Burnham promises huge change - but leaves questions about plan to deliver it
summary: Burnham pledged the biggest change in British politics in 40 years. Critics question the concrete plans for achieving this ambitious goal. The speech was his first as the new Labour leader.

headline: Mother of Henry Nowak killer jailed for removing knife from murder scene
summary: Kiran Kaur was jailed for obstructing justice. She removed the knife used to murder student Henry Nowak. Her son was the killer of Henry Nowak.

headline: Bayeux Tapestry in 'wonderful state' after journey to London, French minister says
summary: The Bayeux Tapestry is in 'a wonderful state' after its journey. This was confirmed by the French culture minister. The historic artifact has arrived in London.
